headline: Morgan Stanley lifts server market TAM to $809B, boosts targets on compute stocks
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley has raised its server market total addressable market forecast to $809 billion for 2026, representing 82% year-over-year growth, as enterprise compute demand proves more resilient than expected despite significant price increases.

raw.summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley has raised its server market total addressable market forecast to $809 billion for 2026, representing 82% year-over-year growth, as enterprise compute demand proves more resilient than expected despite significant price increases.

headline: Should HPE’s Expanded AI Partnerships and Hybrid Cloud Push Require Action From Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Investors?
summary: Over the past week, Hewlett Packard Enterprise and partners including Veeam, Rocket Software, Citrix, Vultr, Schneider Electric, and CloudCasa announced expanded collaborations and product launches spanning AI data centers, private cloud, networking, security, and disaster recovery, while HPE also detailed unified partner programs and hybrid quantum-HPC initiatives. Together with management’s disclosure of very large AI-driven revenue growth and accelerated earnings targets, these moves...

headline: Schneider Electric Launches Industrial Automation Modernization as a Service Built on HPE Infrastructure
summary: Schneider Electric, the leader in digital transformation of energy management and automation, today announced "Industrial Automation Modernization as a Service", a new offering designed to help industrial organizations modernize automation environments without disrupting production. The offering combines Schneider Electric's EcoStruxure™ Automation Expert (EAE), services, and lifecycle expertise with HPE SimpliVity hybrid cloud infrastructure and software, providing a flexible, resilient foundat

headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks to Target This Week
summary: The best-performing stocks typically have robust sales growth, increasing margins, and rising returns on capital, and those that can maintain this trifecta year in and year out often become the legends of the investing world.

raw.headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks to Target This Week

headline: FormFactor (FORM) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of semiconductor testing company FormFactor (NASDAQ:FORM) jumped 3.4% in the afternoon session after the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index hit a fresh record high even as the broader Nasdaq slipped as NVIDIA unveiled its next-generation Vera Rubin platform at the ISC High Performance 2026 conference in Hamburg, which set off a chain reaction across the chip and AI-server supply chain.
